task_completion.description: Navigate to the Air-Side HVAC module in eQUEST
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST interface is open and the 'Air-Side HVAC' module is selected, typically visible in the module navigation bar or component tree.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the middle floor PSZ HVAC systems
task_completion.visual_evidence: The component tree or system list shows the middle floor systems selected or being edited. Note: Look for systems named M.S21, M.E22, M.N23, M.W24, and M.C25.

task_completion.description: Set the Humidifier Type to ELECTRIC for the target systems
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties dialog box or spreadsheet view for the middle floor systems showing the 'Humidifier Type' field explicitly set to 'ELECTRIC'.

task_completion.description: Set Minimum Humidity to 30% and Maximum Humidity to 60%
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties dialog box or spreadsheet view showing 'Minimum Humidity' (or Min RH) set to 30 and 'Maximum Humidity' (or Max RH) set to 60 for the target systems.

task_completion.description: Run a full annual DOE-2.2 simulation
task_completion.visual_evidence: A simulation progress window, a 'Simulation Complete' dialog, or the eQUEST results viewer appearing, indicating that the DOE-2.2 simulation was executed.
The agent clicking the 'Save' icon (floppy disk), using the File > Save menu, or a dialog confirming the project has been saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the eQUEST GUI rather than editing the .inp text file directly
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with eQUEST's graphical dialog boxes, component trees, and spreadsheet views. There should be no text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) open editing the raw DOE-2 input file.

integrity.description: Agent actually ran the simulation within the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard eQUEST simulation progress bar or calculation window must be visible, rather than just a terminal command or a mocked output screen.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine eQUEST application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window clearly displays the eQUEST interface, title bar, and standard icons.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target building model is '4StoreyBuilding'. CRITICAL: There is a discrepancy in the task description. The actual middle floor systems in the model are named M.S21, M.E22, M.N23, M.W24, and M.C25 (not 16-20). The VLM should verify these specific systems were modified. The expected settings are Humidifier Type = 'ELECTRIC', Minimum Humidity = 30%, and Maximum Humidity = 60%. A full annual DOE-2.2 simulation must be executed.
